description_long: This house is a large, multi-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with landscaped greenery and paved driveways. The structure features a combination of gable and hip roofs, with the main building flanked by additional wings and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with numerous symmetrically arranged windows and a spacious driveway leading to a garage area. The landscaping includes several trees and shrubs, providing a suburban neighborhood feel. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and steps, creating a welcoming facade. The overall design blends traditional and modern architectural elements, making it suitable for upscale urban or suburban environments.
description: A large, multi-story house with gable and hip roofs, symmetrical windows, and a prominent front porch, set on a landscaped lot with driveways and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wings, garage area, and additional landscaping along the side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, rooflines, and backyard greenery with less emphasis on entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, side windows, and sloped landscaping at the edge of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a central door, and decorative landscaping.
